title: Chaturmukha Basadi, Gerusoppa

overview.short: Chaturmukha Basadi is a symmetrical Jain temple located in Gerusoppa in Honnavar Taluk of Uttara Kannada district in the Indian state of Karnataka.
overview.description: Chaturmukha Basadi is a symmetrical Jain temple located in Gerusoppa in Honnavar Taluk of Uttara Kannada district in the Indian state of Karnataka. The temple is situated near the banks of the Sharavati.

topPlaces.name: Gerusoppa
topPlaces.description: Gerusoppa is a village in Honnavar Taluk in Uttara Kannada District in the Indian state of Karnataka. The village is also known as Nagarbastikeri and comes under Nagarbastikeri Panchayat.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chaturmukha Basadi, Gerusoppa?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chaturmukha Basadi, Gerusoppa is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chaturmukha Basadi, Gerusoppa?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Hubli Airport (134 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (134 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chaturmukha Basadi, Gerusoppa?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chaturmukha Basadi, Gerusoppa at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chaturmukha Basadi, Gerusoppa?
faq.a: Stays in Chaturmukha Basadi, Gerusoppa start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
